coupon.source_phrase_block: The pass admits 2 adults and 4 children (ages 7-17) at $10 each (general admission and special exhibition). Admission is free for children under 7. Admission price changing 1/20/2026 : The regular price of adult admission will increase to $30, and the discounted rate with this pass will increase to $15. Discount admission for children will remain $10. This change takes effect starting 1/20/2026.
